hero_desc: MaxTec Group is a UK-based startup helping businesses build strong digital products through modern web & app development, UI/UX design, and scalable smart solutions.
about_p1: Founded in the heart of London, MaxTec Group bridges British creativity with global technology. We don't just write code; we craft integrated digital experiences that help businesses grow and compete in the digital age.
about_p2: Our small team brings together software engineering, UI/UX design, and security-minded development to deliver practical, high-quality products that scale with your business.
management_lead_desc: Leads the overall vision, key client relationships, and ensures every project delivers real business value.
management_member_desc: Supports MaxTec Group's growth by overseeing day-to-day delivery and keeping communication smooth between team and clients.
services_desc: We provide a comprehensive range of advanced technical services to meet your business needs
serv_1_desc: Building fast, responsive, and scalable websites and web apps using modern technologies like React, Node.js, and Python.
serv_1_features: Responsive Design • High Performance • SEO Optimized • Scalable
serv_2_desc: Advanced AI solutions, machine learning, and big data analytics to help your company make smarter decisions.
serv_2_features: Data Analysis • ML Models • Smart Automation • Predictive Insights
serv_3_desc: Protecting your digital infrastructure from cyber threats through penetration testing and advanced protection systems.
serv_3_features: Penetration Testing • Security Assessment • Data Protection • 24/7 Monitoring
serv_4_desc: Beautiful and user-friendly interface design that enhances user experience and increases conversions.
serv_4_features: Professional Design • Prototypes • User Testing • Design System
serv_5_desc: Specialized consulting to help you choose the right technologies and improve your digital operations.
serv_5_features: Tech Assessment • Digital Strategy • Performance Optimization • Training
serv_6_desc: Comprehensive technical support and regular maintenance to ensure your systems run efficiently.
serv_6_features: 24/7 Support • Security Updates • Backups • Performance Monitoring
projects_subtitle: Live examples of our technical creativity
contact_info_desc: We are here to answer your inquiries and discuss your next project.
contact_success_msg: Your message has been received successfully. Thank you for contacting us.
contact_error_msg: An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again.
privacy_intro: We respect your privacy. This policy explains how MaxTec Group collects and uses your information when you use our website and contact us via the contact form.
privacy_section_1_body:
We may collect information you provide directly such as your name, email, selected service type, estimated budget, and message content.
We may also collect basic technical data automatically (e.g., browser type and IP address) for security and performance improvements.
privacy_section_2_title: How do we use your data?
privacy_section_2_body:
We use your data to respond to your inquiry, provide a suitable proposal, and improve our services and website experience.
We do not sell your personal data.
privacy_section_3_body:
We may use service providers (such as EmailJS) to deliver contact form messages to our email inbox. This is only for operating the service.
Please avoid sending highly sensitive information (like passwords) through the contact form.
privacy_section_4_body: We keep contact data for as long as needed to respond, follow up, and manage our business. You can request deletion at any time by contacting us.
privacy_section_5_title: Your rights & how to contact us
privacy_section_5_body: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data. Contact us at: maxtecgroup.co@gmail.com
why_1_desc: Hands-on experience delivering real digital solutions for businesses
why_2_desc: A focused, multi-skilled team built for speed and outcomes
why_3_desc: Clean delivery, clear communication, and solid engineering practices
why_4_desc: Support team available 24/7 to ensure your complete satisfaction
pricing_desc: Choose the plan that fits your project needs
starter_desc: Perfect for small projects and startups
refund_policy_intro: This policy governs the terms of refund and return related to digital and professional services provided by Maxtec Group
refund_policy_nature_desc: Since our services are customized and depend on time and technical resources, they are not treated like returnable physical products
refund_policy_deposits_desc: Any advance payment, deposit, or project booking fee is non-refundable in principle
refund_policy_phases_desc: Amounts related to completed phases are non-refundable
refund_policy_non_refundable_desc: No refund is allowed for analysis, consultations, designs, programming, domain purchases, hosting, or third-party services
refund_policy_cases: Cases Where Refund May Be Considered
refund_policy_cases_desc: Maxtec Group may reasonably consider a refund request if the project was not started within a reasonable period without valid reason
refund_policy_rejection: Cases Where Refund is Not Accepted
refund_policy_rejection_desc: Refund request is not accepted if the customer changed their mind after work began
refund_policy_correction_desc: We have the right to review and attempt to fix any issues before considering any refund
refund_policy_process_desc: Submit a written request to maxtecgroup.co@gmail.com with invoice number, service description, and reason for refund
refund_policy_review_period_desc: Refund requests are typically reviewed within 7 to 14 business days
refund_policy_customer_cancellation_desc: Customer may request cancellation at any time in writing
refund_policy_our_cancellation_desc: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate service if customer violates terms
refund_policy_law_desc: This policy is governed by the laws of England and Wales, United Kingdom
privacy_policy_intro: Maxtec Group respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data
cookies_policy_types: Types of Cookies We May Use
terms_conditions_intro: These Terms and Conditions govern your use of Maxtec Group's website and services
